panel_question: 品牌价值观营销的公共责任：UGC+户外大屏放大的传播风险

verdict_summary.consensus_direction: UGC+户外大屏需要系统性审核机制，审核应透明化、多元化，品牌应承担公共传播责任
verdict_summary.key_verdict: The campaign's core message of diverse motherhood is resilient to distortion. The execution risk (unreviewed UGC on outdoor screens) is real but manageable. The discussion produced actionable recommendations.

claim_gate_verified: Campaign invited UGC with hashtag #用镜头再写一遍我的妈妈#
Campaign promised outdoor screen display at Guangzhou Zhengjia mall
Three sample images were brand-produced showing diverse mother types
Campaign framing was 'moms are more than one template'
disputed_in_discussion: Whether review mechanisms existed internally (unverifiable from public data)
Whether actual harmful UGC was submitted (no evidence of this)
The specific risk level of outdoor screen UGC (theoretical risk, no actual incident cited)

recommendations: Brand should publish explicit UGC review standards before future campaigns
Review teams should include diverse cultural backgrounds
Outdoor screen content should go through legal, brand, and risk assessment review
User representatives should participate in review standard formulation
Brand should conduct public retrospective on this campaign's review gaps
Industry should develop UGC marketing self-regulatory guidelines
